message:
fix(eval): handle IsNull/UnaryOp/InList/Between in group aggregate expressions (#87)

eval_group_agg_join_expr was missing match arms for these expression
types, causing them to fall through to per-row evaluation and lose
aggregate context. CASE WHEN AVG(x) IS NOT NULL now evaluates correctly
in GROUP BY queries. Also removes unused table_root_pages() and stale
has_mem_table_early variable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
